title: A standards-backed caching and structured-data guide
bodyMarkdown: RFC 9111 defines HTTP cache controls for stored responses [source](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9111). JSON-LD is a supported structured-data format [Google Search Central](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/intro-structured-data).
metaDescription: A standards-backed guide to HTTP caching and JSON-LD structured data.

title: Static rendering benchmark results
bodyMarkdown: Independent tests found that static rendering reduced median page-load time by 18% [Lab A](https://lab-a.example/reports/rendering) [Lab B](https://lab-b.example/reports/rendering).

title: Guide to invoice reminder emails
bodyMarkdown: Send invoice reminder emails before and after an invoice is due. Keep each message concise and include the amount and payment link.
